panels.title: Gateway uptime
panels.description: Approximate gateway uptime inferred from the first persisted metric sample.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(round((extract(epoch from (now() - min(time))) / 60.0)::numeric, 2), 0) AS value FROM system_metrics

panels.title: Latest message count
panels.description: Latest cumulative MQTT messages received by the gateway.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce((SELECT metric_value FROM system_metrics WHERE metric_name='counter.messages.received' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT coalesce((SELECT metric_value FROM system_metrics WHERE metric_name='counter.readings.stored' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT coalesce((SELECT metric_value FROM system_metrics WHERE metric_name='counter.validation.failures' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT coalesce((SELECT metric_value FROM system_metrics WHERE metric_name='latency.telemetry.p95_ms' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value

panels.title: Alert outbox pending
panels.description: Pending alert deliveries waiting in the outbox.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::int AS value FROM alert_outbox WHERE status='pending'

panels.title: Message rate per minute
panels.description: Per-minute rate derived from cumulative counter deltas.

targets.rawSql: WITH points AS (SELECT time, metric_value, lag(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS previous_value, lag(time) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS previous_time FROM system_metrics WHERE metric_name='counter.messages.received' AND $__timeFilter(time)) SELECT $__time(time), greatest(metric_value - previous_value, 0) / greatest(extract(epoch from time - previous_time), 1) * 60.0 AS messages_per_minute FROM points WHERE previous_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Readings stored rate per minute
panels.description: Per-minute stored-reading rate derived from cumulative counter deltas.

targets.rawSql: WITH points AS (SELECT time, metric_value, lag(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS previous_value, lag(time) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS previous_time FROM system_metrics WHERE metric_name='counter.readings.stored' AND $__timeFilter(time)) SELECT $__time(time), greatest(metric_value - previous_value, 0) / greatest(extract(epoch from time - previous_time), 1) * 60.0 AS readings_per_minute FROM points WHERE previous_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Validation failure rate per minute
panels.description: Per-minute validation failure rate derived from cumulative counter deltas.

targets.rawSql: WITH points AS (SELECT time, metric_value, lag(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS previous_value, lag(time) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS previous_time FROM system_metrics WHERE metric_name='counter.validation.failures' AND $__timeFilter(time)) SELECT $__time(time), greatest(metric_value - previous_value, 0) / greatest(extract(epoch from time - previous_time), 1) * 60.0 AS failures_per_minute FROM points WHERE previous_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Telemetry latency percentiles
panels.description: Average, p50, p95, and p99 telemetry processing latency.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(time), replace(metric_name, 'latency.telemetry.', '') AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM system_metrics WHERE metric_name IN ('latency.telemetry.avg_ms', 'latency.telemetry.p50_ms', 'latency.telemetry.p95_ms', 'latency.telemetry.p99_ms') AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Validation failures by type
panels.description: Data-quality errors recorded during the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT error_type, count(*)::int AS failures, count(DISTINCT device_id)::int AS affected_devices, max(time) AS latest_failure FROM data_quality_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY error_type ORDER BY failures DESC

panels.title: Alert outbox status
panels.description: Alert delivery queue status by channel.

targets.rawSql: SELECT channel, status, count(*)::int AS deliveries, max(updated_at) AS latest_update FROM alert_outbox GROUP BY channel, status ORDER BY deliveries DESC, channel, status
